_comment: CLIENT-SPECIFIC GUARDRAIL — RED HORSE CONSTRUCTION ONLY. Do NOT apply this config to any other client.
guardrail_notes: THIS RULE APPLIES TO RED HORSE CONSTRUCTION ONLY — do not copy to other client configs.
NEVER write to manus_google_drive: root — that is the personal Drive.
ALWAYS use --drive-root-folder-id 0AMo6XJqwjJ1zUk9PVA with every rclone command for this client.
ALL inputs (content plans, briefs, approvals) come FROM manus_google_drive:RedHorse-Ai.
ALL outputs (reports, drafts, published content) go TO manus_google_drive:RedHorse-Ai.
GitHub (RyanC007/ai-manager-stack) is the backup layer only — shared Drive is the source of truth.
Other clients use their own Drive configurations — this shared_drive_folder_id is unique to Red Horse.
